hero.title: Preserving Endangered Languages
hero.subtitle: A digital platform dedicated to documenting and preserving the world's endangered languages through written documents, vocabulary databases, and audio recordings.
hero.title_language: {{language}} has been spoken for over a thousand years.
hero.subtitle_language: We're documenting it before it isn't.

hero_v2.eyebrow: A language falls silent every two weeks
hero_v2.sub: Nativo documents the world's endangered languages — their vocabulary, their writing, and the voices that speak them. Every word you add to {{language}} keeps it alive a little longer.
hero_v2.reassure: Free, open, and built by communities like yours.

hero_card.title: Look up a word in {{language}}
hero_card.hint: Search the dictionary, or watch words drift by while you think.
hero_card.no_entry_body: This word hasn't been documented in {{language}}. You could be the first to add it.

dictionary.subtitle_with_target: Search {{source}} vocabulary and see {{target}} translations. Change the target via the language picker in the header.
dictionary.empty: No matches for “{{query}}” yet. Contributors are still building this dictionary.
dictionary.rate_limited: Too many requests — please slow down and try again in a minute.

activity.heading: Recent activity in {{language}}
activity.empty: Nothing yet — be the first to add a word, document, or recording.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.document_body: Record and preserve written documents in endangered languages
mission.vocabulary_body: Create comprehensive databases with translations and pronunciations
mission.audio_body: Store authentic recordings of native speakers
mission.share_body: Make linguistic heritage accessible for future generations

spotlight.empty: No words yet — be the first to add one.

endangerment.headline: UNESCO classifies {{language}} as {{level}}.
endangerment.progress: {{count}} of an estimated {{target}} core words documented.
endangerment.body_bar: In rural areas children still grow up with it; in and around the cities, increasingly not.
endangerment.body_umu: The youngest fluent speakers are in their seventies and older.
endangerment.body_haw: A revitalization movement is underway; fluent native speakers remain few.
endangerment.body_nav: Still the most widely spoken Indigenous language in North America, but younger speakers are declining.
endangerment.body_ain: Only a handful of fully fluent speakers remain, most very elderly.
endangerment.body_eng: Spoken by all generations across many regions; not classified as endangered.

audio_page.title: {{language}} audio
audio_page.subtitle: Recordings linked to words in this language.
audio_page.empty_hint: Audio upload is on the roadmap — recordings will appear here once contributors add them.

contributors_page.title: {{language}} contributors
contributors_page.subtitle: Everyone who has joined or contributed to this language.
contributors_page.empty: No contributors for this language yet.

learn.heading: Learn {{language}}
learn.subtitle: Read your way in — each text builds on the words you already know.
learn.guest_banner: You can read everything right now. Create an account to track the words you know and get the right next text picked for you.
learn.guest_banner_cta: Sign up to keep your place
learn.load_failed: Failed to load the learning path.
learn.empty: No texts are ready for learning in {{language}} yet.
learn.empty_hint: A text joins the path once its words are fully linked to the dictionary. Editors: finish linking a short text and it will appear here.
learn.step_no_new_words: No new words — a comfortable read
learn.practice_intro_one: You have 1 shaky word to review.
learn.practice_intro: You have {{n}} shaky words to review.
learn.placement_subtitle: Tell us where you're starting from and we'll mark the most common words as known — your path skips what you don't need.
learn.placement_done_zero: Nothing to mark yet — just start reading!

reader.no_text: This document has no readable text yet.
reader.tap_hint: Tap any word to see what it means.
reader.tap_hint_member: Tap any word to see what it means — that also tells us which words to keep practising with you.
reader.saved: Progress saved — your next text will match how this one felt.
reader.guest_cta_post: to track the words you know and get the right next text.
reader.diff_easy_hint: Give me more new words next time

auth.sign_in_subtitle: Sign in to continue preserving languages
auth.register_subtitle: Help preserve endangered languages for future generations
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least {{n}} characters long
auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter your account's email address and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgot_sent: If that address has an account, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.
auth.forgot_failed: Could not send the reset email. Please try again.
auth.reset_subtitle: Pick a new password for your account.
auth.reset_done: Password updated — you can sign in with it now.
auth.reset_failed: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.reset_missing_token: This link is incomplete — open the link from the email, or request a new one.
auth.verify_done: Your email address is confirmed. Thanks!
auth.verify_already: Your email address is already confirmed.
auth.verify_failed: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
auth.verify_prompt: Your email address isn't confirmed yet. We can send the link again.
auth.verify_resent: Verification email sent — check your inbox.

join_modal.title: Join {{language}}
join_modal.must_be_logged_in: You must be logged in to join a language
join_modal.intro_post: This helps others understand your expertise.
join_modal.native_description: This is your first language or you speak it at a native level
join_modal.fluent_description: You can speak, read, and write fluently with minimal errors
join_modal.intermediate_description: You have a good working knowledge but still learning
join_modal.beginner_description: You are just starting to learn this language
join_modal.permissions_note: Permissions to edit and verify content are granted by administrators.

languages_page.title: Languages
languages_page.subtitle: Browse and join languages to start contributing
languages_page.no_results: No languages found matching your criteria.

words_page.title: Words
words_page.subtitle: Browse and manage vocabulary entries
words_page.no_permission: You don't have permission to add words to this language. Contact an administrator to request access.
words_page.empty_subtitle: Start by adding your first word to the collection
words_page.suggest_notice: Know a {{language}} word that's missing? You can suggest it — a reviewer will check it before it's published.

docs_page.select_language: Please select a language to view documents.
docs_page.title: Documents
docs_page.subtitle: Browse and manage text documents and content
docs_page.no_permission: You don't have permission to add documents to this language. Contact an administrator to request access.
docs_page.empty_subtitle: Start by adding your first document to the collection
docs_page.suggest_notice: Have a {{language}} text that's missing? You can suggest it — a reviewer will check it before it's published.
docs_page.coverage_title: Share of words linked to the dictionary — 90% unlocks the learning path

spelling_page.title: Spelling lookup
spelling_page.subtitle: Type a word the way you'd write it and see how it's spelled in the {{language}} standard.
spelling_page.ambiguous: More than one word is written this way — pick the one you mean.
spelling_page.not_found_post: . It may not be in the dictionary yet.

doc_detail.no_texts_title: This document has no texts yet
doc_detail.no_texts_subtitle: Add a translation to start working with this document.
doc_detail.standard_remove_title: Remove this document as the language’s writing standard.
doc_detail.standard_promote_title: Promote this document to be the language’s writing standard. It will then appear on the language strip on Home and on /languages/<id>/standard.
doc_detail.cta_link: Sign up to add a translation
doc_detail.narration_hint: Recordings of this text read aloud by contributors.
doc_detail.narration_hint_editor: Record this text read aloud — learners get a play button in the reader.

dictionary_page.title: Dictionary
dictionary_page.subtitle: Look up words and their translations
dictionary_page.no_other_language: There is no other language to translate to yet.
dictionary_page.no_other_language_hint: The dictionary translates between {{language}} and other languages on the platform; more languages need to be added first.
dictionary_page.no_translations: No translations available in selected languages

word_detail.translations_empty_hint: Link this word to its translations in other languages.
word_detail.synonyms_empty_hint: Words in the same language with overlapping meaning.
word_detail.antonyms_empty_hint: Words in the same language with opposite meaning.
word_detail.add_form_title: Add an inflected form (plural, case form, conjugation, etc.) to this dictionary entry.
word_detail.cannot_delete_lemma: Can't delete the lemma form. Mark another form as lemma first.
word_detail.lemma_delete_title: The lemma form cannot be deleted from here. Mark another form as lemma first.

audio_recorder.mic_access_denied: Microphone access denied. Allow it in your browser settings to record.
audio_recorder.record_button_title: Record a pronunciation for this form using your microphone.
audio_recorder.unsupported: Recording isn't supported in this browser.
audio_recorder.guest_cta: No recording yet — sign up to lend your voice

spelling_variants.label_title: Other ways this form is written outside the standard orthography.
spelling_variants.add_title: Record another way this form is written.

add_word.title: Add New Word
add_word.standard_hint_after: before you start, so your spelling matches the dictionary.
add_word.notes_placeholder: Editorial notes, not shown to the public
add_word.additional_forms_hint: Plurals, case forms, verb conjugations… one row each.
add_word.add_form_title: Add another inflected form (e.g. plural, conjugation)
add_word.suggest_note: You are suggesting this word. A reviewer will check it before it appears in the dictionary.

add_doc.title: Add New Document
add_doc.subtitle: Preserve texts and written content in endangered languages
add_doc.title_placeholder: Enter a title or short description
add_doc.source_placeholder: Origin or citation of this document
add_doc.suggest_note: You're suggesting this document. A reviewer will check it before it appears publicly.

edit_doc.no_permission: You do not have permission to edit this translation.
edit_doc.title: Edit Document
edit_doc.no_permission_banner: You don't have permission to edit this translation. Contact an administrator to request access.
edit_doc.format_title: How the content is rendered. Markdown enables headings, lists and tables — use this for writing-standard references.
edit_doc.learning_order_title: Pin this text to a fixed position at the start of the guided learning path. Leave empty to let the path order it by difficulty.

standard_page.title: Writing standard
standard_page.load_failed: Failed to load the writing standard.
standard_page.no_standard_pre: No writing standard has been published for
standard_page.no_standard_hint: An admin can promote any Document to be this language's official standard from the Document detail page.
standard_page.no_content: This standard document has no readable content yet.

linking.failed_load_document: Failed to load document for linking
linking.lexeme_no_forms: Lexeme has no forms to link
linking.linked_saved_alt_spelling: Linked, and saved “{{original}}” as an alternative spelling of “{{form}}”.
linking.select_text_to_search: Select some text in the document to search for similar words.
linking.no_similar_words: No similar words found for the current selection.
linking.failed_search_words: Failed to search for similar words.
linking.word_required: Word is required before creating a new entry.
linking.created_lexeme_no_form: Created lexeme has no form to link to
linking.word_created_linked_alt: Word created and linked, and “{{original}}” saved as an alternative spelling.
linking.failed_create_link_word: Failed to create and link word
linking.back_to_document_title: Return to the document detail page
linking.auto_expand_title: When on, clicking a single word inside a longer phrase will expand the selection to the whole word boundary.
linking.regen_text_title: Rebuild auto-suggested word links for THIS text only. Existing confirmed or rejected links are preserved; new suggestions appear where matching dictionary words are found.
linking.regen_doc_title: Rebuild auto-suggested word links for EVERY text in this document (all translations). Existing confirmed or rejected links are preserved.
linking.read_only_info: You have read-only access for this language. Linking actions are disabled.
linking.clear_selection_title: Deselect the current span without changing any links
linking.confirm_link_title: Accept this suggested link — the span will be marked as a confirmed dictionary reference.
linking.reject_link_title: Mark this suggestion as wrong. It stays in the database (so it's not re-suggested) but no longer counts as a link.
linking.unlink_title: Delete this link entirely. The span becomes unlinked, and the next Regenerate may suggest it again.
linking.selection_help: Link this selection to an existing word or create a new one.
linking.alt_spelling_title: When the linked word is spelled differently from this selection, save the selection as an alternative spelling of it.
linking.alt_spelling_label: Also save “{{text}}” as an alternative spelling when it differs from the linked word
linking.search_words_title: Find dictionary entries matching the selected text — including via recorded alternative spellings. Results show meanings; hover any for full detail.
linking.create_new_word_title: Open a form to add this span as a brand-new dictionary entry, then link the selection to it in one step.
linking.duplicate_hint_lead: Already in the dictionary — link instead of creating a duplicate?
linking.known_spelling_of: “{{word}}” is a known spelling of it
linking.link_existing_title: Link the selection to the existing entry “{{word}}”.
linking.create_and_link_title: Save this as a new dictionary entry and immediately link the selected text to it.
linking.cancel_new_word_title: Close the form and discard the new-word details
linking.highlight_help: Highlight any portion of the document to review or manage its link.
linking.no_suggestions: No suggestions available. Try regenerating to get new suggestions.
linking.confirm_suggestion_title: Accept this suggestion as a confirmed link without leaving the suggestions list.
linking.reject_suggestion_title: Mark this suggestion as wrong. It won't be re-proposed by future Regenerate runs.
linking.confirm_exact_title: Confirm every suggestion that matched exactly one dictionary word — ambiguous ones stay for review

review.title: {{language}} suggestions
review.subtitle: Words and documents proposed by the community, waiting for your verdict. Approving publishes them; frequent good suggesters are automatically promoted to editors.
review.action_failed: That action failed. Please try again.
review.empty: No pending suggestions — all caught up.
review.reject_reason_prompt: Why is this rejected? (optional, shown to nobody yet but kept in the notes)
review.no_permission: Reviewing suggestions requires verify permission for this language.
